bugs.title: Usage count off by one
bugs.description: Sent 4 messages total (1 selection + 2 planning + 1 companion) but /api/usage reports used=3. Either selection-mode messages are not counted toward the daily limit, or there is an off-by-one error in the usage tracking. If selection-mode exclusion is intentional, it should be documented.

bugs.title: ListChatSessions field naming: lastMessageAt vs updated_at
bugs.description: ListChatSessions returns 'lastMessageAt' field on sessions, but the proto/docs reference 'updated_at'. The field is functionally correct (lastMessageAt >= createdAt for all sessions) but the naming may cause confusion for frontend consumers expecting 'updated_at'.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI re-created all 28 itinerary items on second planning message despite them already existing
ai_behavior_issues.context: When asked 'Add those to my itinerary please', the AI called create_itinerary_items again with all 28 items. The backend correctly detected duplicates and returned skipped_count=28, but the AI wasted a tool call and produced a confusing 'loop' response. The AI should have recognized items were already created from the previous tool result.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: This is a structural data integrity test, not a usefulness evaluation. All scores are 0 because usefulness was not assessed. All 6 phases of the chat history verification passed: 3 sessions created across selection/planning/companion modes, all messages persisted with correct content, roles alternate properly, no empty messages, timestamps are chronologically ordered within sessions, and sessions are fully isolated with no message bleed.
